full_text:
Xu Xi 徐翕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Xi (徐翕). Zang Ba urged Cao Cao to show mercy to the former traitors. Xu Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Lu Bu.
